summary:
Zeolite provides rapid initial control through hydration-induced coagulation but does not offer superior outcomes compared to standard treatments for arterial bleeding due to lack of robust comparative data supporting its efficacy under clinically critical conditions such as active hemorrhage requiring definitive intervention. Answer choice: B  
\boxed{B}
